metadata.description: Beesi Escrow V2 — Solana / Anchor mirror of EVM BeesiEscrow.sol V3 (fee-in-escrow).
metadata.specSource: Mirrors apps/web/contracts/BeesiEscrow.sol on Base. (taskKey, submissionKey) symmetry preserved.

instructions.name: initConfig
docs: Initialize the singleton Config PDA. Deployer becomes owner / operator_admin / pauser. Callable exactly once.

instructions.name: setOperator
docs: Toggle an operator's enabled flag. Caller must be owner or operator_admin.

instructions.name: fundTask
docs: Lock (reward + fee) * max from the publisher into the task vault.
Creates the TaskAccount and Vault PDAs. Reverts on duplicate task_key (init constraint).

instructions.name: approveSubmission
docs: Operator-mediated approval. Atomically transfers reward → performer and fee → fee_recipient.
(task_key, submission_key) is processed at most once via init-only Submission PDA.

instructions.name: autoApproveSubmission
docs: Same as approveSubmission but the program additionally enforces now ≥ auto_approve_at.

instructions.name: rejectSubmission
docs: Operator-mediated rejection. No funds move. Slot is NOT consumed.

instructions.name: refundRemaining
docs: Returns all un-released funds (reward + fee for every un-released slot) to the publisher.
Allowed even when paused so locked funds are never trapped.

errors.name: TaskKeyEmpty
errors.msg: Task key must not be zero

errors.name: RewardZero
errors.msg: Reward per completion must be greater than zero

errors.name: InstancesZero
errors.msg: Max instances must be greater than zero

errors.name: AutoApproveAtZero
errors.msg: Auto-approve timestamp must be greater than zero

errors.name: FeeRecipientRequired
errors.msg: Fee recipient is required when fee > 0

errors.name: TaskAlreadyFunded
errors.msg: Task is already funded

errors.name: TotalOverflow
errors.msg: Total amount overflowed u64

errors.name: TotalZero
errors.msg: Total amount must be greater than zero

errors.name: TaskNotFunded
errors.msg: Task is not in Funded state

errors.name: TaskNotFound
errors.msg: Task does not exist

errors.name: SubmissionAlreadyProcessed
errors.msg: Submission already processed

errors.name: PerformerEmpty
errors.msg: Performer must not be zero address

errors.name: PerformerMismatch
errors.msg: Performer token account does not match performer

errors.name: FeeRecipientMismatch
errors.msg: Fee recipient token account does not match recorded fee recipient

errors.name: PublisherMismatch
errors.msg: Publisher token account owner does not match recorded publisher

errors.name: AutoApproveNotReady
errors.msg: Auto-approve deadline has not been reached

errors.name: TaskInstancesFull
errors.msg: Task instances already full

errors.name: NoRemainingBalance
errors.msg: No remaining balance to refund

errors.name: EscrowPaused
errors.msg: Escrow is paused

errors.name: OnlyOwner
errors.msg: Caller is not the owner

errors.name: OnlyOperator
errors.msg: Caller is not an operator

errors.name: OnlyOperatorAdmin
errors.msg: Caller is not the operator admin or owner

errors.name: OnlyPauser
errors.msg: Caller is not the pauser or owner

errors.name: ZeroOperator
errors.msg: Operator address must not be zero

errors.name: ZeroOperatorAdmin
errors.msg: Operator admin must not be zero

errors.name: ZeroPauser
errors.msg: Pauser must not be zero

errors.name: ZeroOwner
errors.msg: Owner must not be zero

errors.name: OperatorMismatch
errors.msg: Operator record does not match the supplied operator pubkey
